prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.2 kg; Height 160.7 cm; BMI 20.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 113/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.6%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 9.6%), FPG (12 months ago 274mg/dL; 9 months ago 274mg/dL; 6 months ago 303mg/dL; 3 months ago 286mg/dL; current 232mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.1kg; 9 months ago 50.8kg; 6 months ago 53.3kg; 3 months ago 50.8kg; current 52.2kg), Height (12 months ago 160.7cm; 9 months ago 160.7cm; 6 months ago 160.7cm; 3 months ago 160.7cm; current 160.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 113mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 21U/L; 3 months ago 23U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 50mg/g; 9 months ago 49mg/g; 6 months ago 69mg/g; 3 months ago 59mg/g; current 75mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 99mg/dL; 3 months ago 100mg/dL; current 97mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 58mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 135mg/dL; 3 months ago 135mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.76 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
